bodyText: Home Files Chats Automations Space Skills More Hosting Datasets System Terminal Billing Resources Bookmarks Settings Bookmarks Quick access to your bookmarked tabs and recent files Files Chats Automations Space Skills Hosting Datasets System Terminal Billing Plan Credits Usage Payment AI credits $0.00 Add credits Auto top-up Click to configure automatic credit top-ups. Off Disable spending Block all metered AI usage to prevent charges. No AI credits Free Current plan $0 / month AI models Free only AI credits Daily limit Availability Goes to sleep Services 1 service • Not included Server Limited CPU + memory Storage 100GB disk Priority support Not included Basic Most popular $18 / month Upgrade AI models Full model selection AI credits $10/mo included Availability Always on Services 5 services • Custom domains Server 4 cores, 32GB RAM Storage 100GB+ disk Priority support Not included Pro $64 / month Upgrade AI models Full model selection AI credits $40/mo included Availability Always on Services 10 services • Custom domains Server 16 cores, 128GB RAM Storage 100GB+ disk Priority support Included Ultra $200 / month Upgrade AI models Full model selection AI credits $100/mo included Availability Always on Services 50 services • Custom domains Server 64 cores, 512GB RAM Storage 100GB+ disk Priority support Included Free and paid plans also include: Bring your own AI provider. Use the Zo MCP Server to power up any AI with Zo's tools and context. Enter promo code Redeem Gift or redeem AI credits whodaniel.zo.computer whodaniel.zo.space whodaniel@zo.computer +1 (650) 300-9560 ⢕⣿⢀⣏⣿⢳⡕⣆⢺⣋⢟ New Chat New Zo is thinking. Press Esc to stop. What can I do for you? MiniMax 2.7 Free Go whodaniel.zo.computer whodaniel.zo.space whodaniel@zo.computer +1 (650) 300-9560 ⢕⣿⢀⣏⣿⢳⡕⣆⢺⣋⢟ Command Palette Search for a command to run... Command Palette Search for a command to run… Go to File Search for files by name Free model allowance reached. You're now paying for usage. Resets in 21h 11m.
